review_text: The croissants here are exceptional — flaky, buttery, and perfectly laminated. Best I've had outside of Paris.
Their sourdough loaf has a beautiful open crumb and a crackling crust. We buy one every Saturday morning.
Got the chocolate birthday cake for my daughter's party. Incredibly moist, rich ganache, and the frosting was not cloyingly sweet.
Good coffee and a nice spot to sit and work. Came for a quick breakfast on a Tuesday and left happy.
Nice little place. Will definitely come back.
